intro: The Trump administration approved Anthropic to restore access to its Mythos cybersecurity AI model for select US organizations and government agencies after weeks of negotiations. Apple's Vision Pro executive Paul Meade is departing to join OpenAI's hardware team as the companies compete in AI-powered devices. Asian startups Sakana AI and 360 Security launched models positioned as alternatives to Anthropic's restricted Mythos and Fable systems amid ongoing export controls.
